## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` / `BREAKING CHANGE:`)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated where relevant
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

## Notes / trade-offs

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: alternatives considered, risks, follow-ups. -->
